reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, ubicado en una de las entradas a San Miguel de Tucumán posee un hotel con piscina muy limpio y agradable, también una confitería para desayunar, almorzar o merendar, cuenta con descuentos  exclusivos los días domingos para clientes seviclub en carga de combustibles ⛽....

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, located at one of the entrances to San Miguel de Tucumán. It has a very clean and pleasant hotel with a pool, as well as a cafeteria for breakfast, lunch, or a snack. It offers exclusive discounts on Sundays for Seviclub customers when loading fuel.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8171823765692458471/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBbXRlb0xREAE

Al margen que demoran en atender

Very slow service. There aren't enough beach attendants.
Note: the entrance to the beach is always disorganized. It's chaos. Besides the fact that they take a long time to serve you.
